name: Butterscotch Squares
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the margarine and brown sugar on medium speed for 5 minutes.
2. Add eggs one at a time, and vanilla. Mix on low speed until blended.
3. Combine dry ingredients. Add to creamed mixture. Mix on low speed until blended.
4. Add nuts, mix to blend.
5. Spread mixture evenly in 2 greased 12 x 18 x 2 inch baking pans.
6. Bake at 325 degrees for 25 minutes.
7. Yield: 60 portions. May be baked in 1 (18 x 26 x 2 inch) pan. Cut into 6 x 10 pieces.
VARIATION: Butterscotch Chocolate Chip Brownies: Add 1 pound chocolate chips.
